seo.description: Contact NAT Interpretation & Translation Services. Phone (207) 385-7813, email contact@nattranslation.com. Request a quote for interpretation or document translation.
seo.keywords: contact interpreter Maine, translation quote, NAT translation, Bangor Maine interpreter, 24/7 interpretation
seo.og_title: Contact Us - NAT Interpretation & Translation Services
seo.og_description: Get in touch for professional interpretation and translation services.
seo.page_title: Contact Us - NAT Interpretation & Translation Services, LLC

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.lead: Get in touch for a free quote or to discuss your language service needs
hero.image_alt: Close-up of a globe with country names in multiple languages, evoking world languages and reaching out across communities

info.heading: Get in Touch
info.service_area_note_1: In-person services in the Bangor area and nearby; mileage may apply
info.intro: We are here to help. Reach out via phone, email, or use the contact form to request a quote or ask questions.
info.scheduling_description: Use the form or email for quotes, document projects, and booking on-site sessions.
info.email_note: We typically respond within 24 hours on business days
info.phone_note_1: Multilingual phone/video interpretation: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
info.phone_note_2: Rates for phone and video interpreting are confirmed when you call or request a quote; mileage may apply for in-person visits.
info.scheduling_note: For immediate spoken-language help by phone or video, our interpreters are available 24/7 at the number above.

map.iframe_title: Map showing NAT Interpretation & Translation Services — 96 Harlow St, Bangor, Maine

placeholders.name: John Doe
placeholders.language_pair: e.g., Bambara → English, Wolof → English, Arabic → English
placeholders.message: Please provide details about your service needs, document type (if applicable), urgency, and any other relevant information...

form.heading: Request a Quote
form.intro: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you with a detailed quote within 24 hours.
form.legal: By submitting this form, you agree to be contacted by NAT Interpretation & Translation Services, LLC.

helper_text.phone: Optional - We'll call if we need clarification
helper_text.language_pair: Specify source and target languages (see languages we support for examples)
helper_text.preferred_datetime: Optional - For interpretation services, please specify your preferred date and time

extras.response_time_html: We typically respond to email and form messages within 24 hours on business days. For urgent spoken-language support by phone or video, call (207) 385-7813—multilingual interpreters are available 24/7.
extras.free_consultation_description: Not sure which service you need? We offer free consultations to help determine the best language solution for your specific situation.
